para_trans: GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER: TRANSFER 2026 / P.No.29 / PRACTICE-3 (14A)
Madam Cama Marg, Martyr Rajguru Chowk,
Regulation of transfers of Maharashtra Government employees and in the discharge of government duties.
As per Section 4 (4) and 4 (5) of the Prevention of Delay Act, 2005, the following Ministries
The Assistant Cell Officer of the Department is being transferred inter-departmental for administrative reasons.
He is being transferred and posted in the section indicated in column-5 in front of his name: -
2. Mr. Tupe, Assistant Cell Officer should immediately join the Medical Education and Pharmaceuticals Department.
3. Mr. Tupe, Assistant Cell Officer, Department of Women and Child Development dated 13.04.2026 (M / s. P.)
Since he was unilaterally relieved of his duties, Mr. Tupe's date is 13.04.2026 (m. (a) The order
The period up to date is as per Rule 9 (14) (f) of the M.N.S. (General Conditions of Service) Rules, 1981.
As per (II), compulsory waiting period is being regularised.
The Government Order is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
